fullArticle:
Kurt Russell's action thriller is a new Netflix global sensation.

Russell has a storied career, starring in many high-profile projects over the years. Among Russell's best movies are Tombstone, Escape From New York, Big Trouble in Little China, The Thing, and many others. Recently, the actor became a major name on streaming, playing the key role of Lee Shaw in one of Apple TV's best sci-fi series, Monarch: Legacy of Monsters. Russell famously shares that role with his son, Wyatt Russell, who plays the younger Lee. The Monsterverse is not the only iconic movie franchise the actor has joined, and Russell's other high-octane action franchise is now trending on streaming around the world.
